name: bigquery-patent-search
author: RobThePCGuy
description: Fast, cloud-based patent searching across 76 million+ worldwide patents using Google BigQuery - keyword search, CPC classification, patent details retrieval
description_zh: 基于Google BigQuery的云端专利搜索工具，可检索7600多万全球专利，支持关键词搜索、CPC分类查询和专利详细信息获取。

name: patent-application-creator
author: RobThePCGuy
description: Complete end-to-end patent application creation from invention disclosure to USPTO-ready filing - prior art search, claims drafting, specification writing, diagrams, compliance checking
description_zh: 一项综合技能，指导用户完成从现有技术检索、权利要求起草到说明书撰写和美国专利商标局合规性检查的完整专利申请流程。

name: patent-claims-analyzer
author: RobThePCGuy
description: Automated analysis of patent claims for USPTO compliance with 35 USC 112(b) requirements - antecedent basis, definiteness, claim structure
description_zh: 用于自动分析专利权利要求书，确保其符合美国专利商标局（USPTO）法规要求的工具，检查权利要求的前序基础、明确性及结构问题。

name: patent-diagram-generator
author: RobThePCGuy
description: Create patent-style technical diagrams including flowcharts, block diagrams, and system architectures using Graphviz with reference numbering
description_zh: 该Claude技能使用Graphviz生成专利风格的技术图表，包括流程图、框图和系统架构图，并自动添加参考编号，适用于专业专利文档制作。

name: prior-art-search
author: RobThePCGuy
description: Systematic 7-step methodology for comprehensive patent prior art searches and patentability assessments using BigQuery and CPC classification
description_zh: 一个系统性的七步方法论，用于使用 BigQuery 和 CPC 分类进行全面的专利现有技术检索、可专利性评估和自由实施分析。

name: evals-context
author: RooCodeInc
description: Provides context about the Roo Code evals system structure in this monorepo. Use when tasks mention "evals", "evaluation", "eval runs", "eval exercises", or working with the evals infrastructure. Helps distinguish between the evals execution system (packages/evals, apps/web-evals) and the public website evals display page (apps/web-roo-code/src/app/evals).

description: AI-driven browser automation via Model Context Protocol

description_zh: 更新B2C CLI项目的用户指南、CLI参考和API文档。

This skill creates absurdly thorough documentation covering local setup, architecture, and deployment.

This skill should be used when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React/Next.js code to ensure optimal performance patterns. Triggers on tasks involving React components, Next.js pages, data fetching, bundle optimization, or performance improvements.

name: spec
author: Smana
description: Create a specification for non-trivial changes. Creates GitHub issue + spec file in a dedicated directory.

name: search
author: Spacehunterz
description: Natural language search through Claude Code session history. Search for previous prompts, conversations, topics, file modifications, and context from past sessions. Useful for finding earlier work and understanding project continuity.
description_zh: 该技能支持对Claude Code会话历史进行自然语言搜索，帮助开发者查找之前的提示、对话和文件修改记录。它解析项目目录中的JSONL文件，匹配用户查询内容，并过滤代理日志。适用于需要追溯项目上下文和避免重复工作的场景。
_original_description: This skill enables natural language search through Claude Code session history stored in JSONL files. It helps developers find previous prompts, conversations, and file modifications across sessions. The tool parses user messages from project directories and matches queries against content, skipping agent logs. It's useful for maintaining project continuity and avoiding repeated work.

name: automating-calendar
author: SpillwaveSolutions
description: Automates macOS Calendar via JXA with AppleScript dictionary discovery. Use when asked to "create calendar events", "automate calendar", "JXA calendar scripting", "EventKit automation", or "PyXA calendar automation". Covers events, calendars, recurrence, time zones, batch operations, and EventKit ObjC bridge.

name: automating-chrome
author: SpillwaveSolutions
description: Automates Google Chrome and Chromium-based browsers via JXA with AppleScript dictionary discovery. Use when asked to "automate Chrome tabs", "control browser with JXA", "Chrome AppleScript automation", "Chromium browser scripting", or "browser tab management". Covers windows, tabs, execute(), tunneling patterns, and permissions.

name: automating-contacts
